Yue Liu

Master student

I am current a second year master student at The Center for Data Science, Zhejiang University, advised by Prof. Xiaoye Miao. My research interests lie in graph neural networks and graph mining algorithms.

Contact me

Publications

* indicates equal contribution, and # indicates my advisor

  1. Reliable Community Search on Uncertain Graphs

    Xiaoye Miao#, Yue Liu, Lu Chen, Yunjun Gao, Jianwei Yin

    The 38th International Conference on Data Engineering (ICDE), 2022.

  2. Prediction of Maximum Absorption Wavelength Using Deep Neural Networks

    Jinning Shao*, Yue Liu*, Jiaqi Yan*, Ze-Yi Yan, Yangyang Wu, Zhongying Ru, Jia-Yu Liao, Xiaoye Miao#, Linghui Qian.

    Journal of Chemical Information and Modeling, 2022.

  3. Deep Learning Enabled Prediction of Enantioselectivity in Asymmetric Catalysis

    Ze-Yi Yan*, Yue Liu*, Yangyang Wu, Jinning Shao, Linghui Qian, Xiaoye Miao#, Jia-Yu Liao.

    Manuscript in preparation
